a:r.a:t: Existing field — now a date picker
6-tab layout: Job / Eligibility / Salary / Selection / Bond / Declaration
Auto-save after each section with toast notification
Full WYSIWYG editor with PDF upload alternative
Both minimum and expected hires — clearer for companies
Chip-style tag input for required skills
Company's own registration link field — retained from current form

★ CGPA (existing-retained· ★ Backlogs allowed? (IIT Indore, IIT Guwahati) · ★ High school % criterion (IIT Indore) · Gender filter: All / Male / Female / Others ★ Any Specific Requirement related to SLP (existing – retained)
